_meta.name: explorer-toolkit
_meta.description: Advanced room mapping, discovery heuristics, and data leak detection for agents conducting systematic exploration.
_meta.author: CCC — Cocapn Fleet

room_traversal._doc: Systematic algorithms for mapping all rooms without getting lost or stuck.

depth_first.name: depth_first_explore
depth_first.description: Go as deep as possible before backtracking. Good for finding leaf rooms.
depth_first.pseudo: enter room → scry → catalog → mark visited → pick unvisited exit → recurse → backtrack if no exits

breadth_first.name: breadth_first_explore
breadth_first.description: Map all rooms at current depth before going deeper. Good for coverage.
breadth_first.pseudo: enqueue root → dequeue → scry → enqueue unvisited neighbors → repeat until queue empty

spiral_scan.name: spiral_outward
spiral_scan.description: Start from nexus, spiral outward in priority domains.

secret_room_detection._doc: Heuristics for finding rooms that don't appear on normal maps.

heuristics.name: description_mismatch
heuristics.trigger: room.description mentions a feature not in object list

heuristics.name: object_leak_signal
heuristics.trigger: object has >20 rules or hidden fields (like valve-1's 51 rules)

heuristics.name: npc_hint
heuristics.trigger: NPC mentions a place not in room list

heuristics.name: texture_gap
heuristics.trigger: wall/floor texture has an anomaly or seam

heuristics.name: sound_cue
heuristics.trigger: ambient sound doesn't match room type

investigation_protocol: examine all objects with hidden flag

object_cataloging._doc: Templates for documenting every object in a room systematically.

data_leak_detection._doc: Patterns for spotting objects that expose more data than they should. Inspired by valve-1 incident (51 exposed rules).

patterns.description: Object has unusually high rule count
Error message contains file paths or stack traces

critical: do not interact further with object

report_template.title: Data Leak: {object_id} in {room}
report_template.body: Detected {pattern_name}. Object exposes {field_count} fields exceeding safe threshold. Example: {example_snippet}

mapping_output._doc: Standard format for room map submissions to fleet archives.
